label: The Strategist
gift: Clarity in complexity — the cartographer who finds pattern, bottleneck, and sequence.

cards.name: See your own overwhelm honestly — Sense
cards.essence: In yourself: clarity in complexity, sensing what is here.
steps: Notice what is actually here — sensing what is here.
Turn it inward: your own overwhelm honestly.
cards.primaryQuestion: What am I not letting myself notice here?
cards.campaignQuestion: What does this situation need someone to see?
cards.optimizesFor: Seeing what is actually there before reacting — your clarity in complexity at the Sense level.
forbiddenMoves: Reacting before you have actually looked
Sliding into the Detached Planner — mapping instead of acting.
failureModes: Blind spots you swear aren't there
cards.remediation: Name one thing you hadn't let yourself see.
contraindications: Overusing this becomes the Detached Planner — mapping instead of acting.

cards.name: Take in the discomfort of not yet knowing — Sense
cards.essence: In yourself: clarity in complexity, sensing what is here.
steps: Receive it without flinching — sensing what is here.
Turn it inward: the discomfort of not yet knowing.
cards.primaryQuestion: What am I actually feeling, underneath?
cards.campaignQuestion: What is the other person or group really reaching for?
cards.optimizesFor: Receiving the charge instead of bracing against it — your clarity in complexity at the Sense level.
forbiddenMoves: Numbing or performing the feeling instead of feeling it
Sliding into the Detached Planner — mapping instead of acting.
cards.remediation: Let it land for one breath before you respond.
contraindications: Overusing this becomes the Detached Planner — mapping instead of acting.

cards.name: Cut the noise in your own head — Sense
cards.essence: In yourself: clarity in complexity, sensing what is here.
steps: Transform the charge — sensing what is here.
Turn it inward: the noise in your own head.
cards.primaryQuestion: What charge am I carrying that needs to move?
cards.campaignQuestion: What needs to be metabolized before we move together?
cards.optimizesFor: Metabolizing the charge so it stops leaking — your clarity in complexity at the Sense level.
forbiddenMoves: Venting the charge onto someone else
Sliding into the Detached Planner — mapping instead of acting.
cards.remediation: Name what you are feeling out loud before you act.
contraindications: Overusing this becomes the Detached Planner — mapping instead of acting.

cards.name: Sharpen your read of patterns — Sense
cards.essence: In yourself: clarity in complexity, sensing what is here.
steps: Build the capacity — sensing what is here.
Turn it inward: your read of patterns.
cards.primaryQuestion: Who do I need to become for this?
cards.campaignQuestion: What capacity does this work need us to build?
cards.optimizesFor: Building the capacity the work keeps asking for — your clarity in complexity at the Sense level.
forbiddenMoves: Forcing growth or skipping the rep
Sliding into the Detached Planner — mapping instead of acting.
cards.remediation: Pick one small rep and do it once.
contraindications: Overusing this becomes the Detached Planner — mapping instead of acting.
